targets.rawSql: SELECT count() FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > today()
SELECT count() FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > today() AND status = 'decoded'
SELECT count() FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > today() AND status = 'failed'
SELECT avg(snr_db) FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > today() AND status = 'decoded'

panels.title: Upcoming + recent passes
panels.description: Latest known state per (pass_start, satellite). Status pending = scheduled; recording/recorded/decoded/failed = post-AOS.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pass_start, satellite, freq_mhz, round(max_elevation, 1) AS max_el, duration_s, status, round(snr_db, 1) AS snr, image_path, notes FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY pass_start DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT satellite, count() AS passes, sum(if(status='decoded',1,0)) AS decoded FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY satellite ORDER BY passes DESC
SELECT toStartOfDay(pass_start) AS day, count() AS passes FROM noaa.pass_latest FINAL WHERE pass_start > now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
